instruction: Please update the priority of the inbox message from Lantern Arcade.

rule_ref.rule_text: When prioritizing messages, he prefers marking internship, portfolio, or collaboration messages as high priority.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: I treat internship, portfolio, and collaboration messages as high priority.

attributes.subject: Thanks for connecting at the meetup
attributes.body: Hi Michael, it was great meeting you. If you want, send over your portfolio sometime and we can see whether a summer internship conversation or a small collaboration makes sense later on. No rush at all on the reply.

attributes.subject: Building access issue before client visit
attributes.body: The front door badge reader is failing again. Please confirm whether the repair team can get here before the afternoon walkthrough.

attributes.subject: Action needed today for payroll file mismatch
attributes.body: We found a mismatch in this week's payroll export and need the corrected file before 2 PM today to avoid processing delays.

attributes.subject: Volunteer signup and poster pickup
attributes.body: We're still looking for two volunteers to help with poster pickup and booth setup for this weekend's neighborhood art walk.

attributes.subject: Invoice correction needed by noon
attributes.body: The client invoice total is off and accounting needs the corrected version by noon today for release.
